'''鈭歮-d-th-zh''' ('''kamadthezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:channelize|channelize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-d-th-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:channelize|channelize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-d-th-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kamadthezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimadthezhoko|thimadthezhoko]] || [[word:jimadthezhoko|jimadthezhoko]] || [[word:shimadthezhoko|shimadthezhoko]] || [[word:kimadthezhoko|kimadthezhoko]]
|-

|-
